§6Mercury§f

§aToxic liquid metal — essential for Desh production and NITAN© super fuel!§f

§bMercury§f is a critical liquid for progression. It comes in two forms: fluid (mB) and drops (125mB each, equivalent to an ingot). Tiny drops are nugget-equivalent (9:1 with drops).

§6Production§f:
§b• Centrifuge§f: Redstone Crystals (3 drops), Redstone Ore (1 drop), Sulfur Crystals, Gold Crystals, Starmetal Crystals
§b• Ore Acidizer§f: Cinnabar + H2O2 → 3 drops; Block of Redstone + H2O2 → 1 drop
§b• Electrolysis§f: Vitriol → 1 drop; Nitric Acid + Starmetal/Gold Crystals
§b• Coker Unit§f: Fish Oil (10,000mB) → Petroleum Coke + 1,000mB Mercury
§b• Red Mud§f: Comb. Oven or Electrolysis
§b• Cyclotron§f: Lithium Dust + Gold Powder

§6Uses§f:
§b• Desh Ingot§f: Chemical Plant — 200mB Mercury + 200mB Light Oil + Desh Blend
§b• NITAN© Fuel§f: Industrial Mixer — Kerosene + Mercury + Nitanium Blend
§b• Fluorescent Light§f: Glass Pane + Drop of Mercury + Aluminium Plate → 8 lights
§b• DeshReady™ Blend§f: Desh Blend + Drop of Mercury + Lignite Powder

§c⚠ Safety§f: Mercury emits toxic fumes! Handle with appropriate protection.

§eTip§f: The §bCoker Unit§f (Fish Oil → Mercury) is the most efficient bulk production method once you have fish oil automation!
